docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-26-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-05-2020 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60) SERVED OCT-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JOSEPH

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2021 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-20-2021 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR KRISTEN LYONS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR JOSEPH LEE IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2021; JUDGMENT DEBTOR JOSEPH LEE FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. JUDGEMENT CREDITOR KRISTEN LYONS IS PRESENT. JUDGEMENT DEBTOR JOSEPH LEE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF KRISTEN LYONS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH LEE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $40) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYONS, KRISTEN DBA BELLA CONCIERGE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JOSEPH
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO THE DEPARTMENT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JOSEPH
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYONS, KRISTEN DBA BELLA CONCIERGE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $137.50 SERVED OCT-22-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JOSEPH
ORDER ORDER OF EXAMINATION CONNTINUED TO DEC-20-2021 AT 11:00 A.M. NO APPEARANCE IS MADE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR. A BENCH LETTER IS ISSUED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2021 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JOSEPH HEARING SET FOR NOV-01-2021 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSSUED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LYONS, KRISTEN DBA BELLA CONCIERGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, JOSEPH $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $167.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $817.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SIGNED & SEALED (ORIGINAL) BENCH WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDER WITH ONE (1)COPY FORWARDED TO SHERIFF'S DEPT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $832.84 FILED BY LYONS, KRISTEN DBA BELLA CONCIERGE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
